title: The Sea Train Project
description: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Iceburg, Franky, Tom, Spandam, Kokoro. Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Uh!? Hey!! Aren't you, like, strong!!?

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Why am I getting beat up by....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Thanks a lot for acting so super...

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You probably know the meaning of that...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky, we already know every- thing.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: I've got a bad feeling about this...

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: I have something to give you.

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: Give us the blue- print of...

summary: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
